pr.title: PR #130 — Capability Validation Knowledge Framework v1
pr.description:
## Summary

The validation knowledge layer: how a capability has been validated, tested, reviewed, and verified, captured as a first-class capability object. Where #122 establishes identity, #129 establishes location, and #128 establishes meaning, this layer establishes *validation history*.

Same deterministic, append-only, evidence-bundle pattern as #122–#129. Consumes Registry #122 + Relationship #127 + File Knowledge #129 + Devin Session Import #126 read-only — nothing is mutated. Non-goals respected: no automatic test execution, no CI integration, no orchestration, no graph engine, no dashboards, no network calls.

### Models (`src/axiom_core/capability_validation_knowledge.py`)
- `CapabilityValidationRecord` — `validation_type` ∈ {PYTEST, RUFF, CI, DEVIN_REVIEW, CLI_TEST, MANUAL_TEST, INTEGRATION_TEST, REGRESSION_TEST}; `validation_status` ∈ {PASSED, FAILED, PARTIAL, WARNING}; `validator`, `summary`, `raw_payload`, `schema_version`
- `CapabilityValidationFinding` — `severity` ∈ {INFO, WARNING, ERROR, CRITICAL}, `resolved` flag, linked to a record via `validation_id`
- `CapabilityValidationArtifact` — `validation_id`, `artifact_path`, `summary`
- `CapabilityValidationKnowledge` — per-capability `validation_count`, `finding_count`, `unresolved_count`, `validation_type_counts`
- `CapabilityValidationKnowledgeReport` / `...Evidence` / `...Engine`

### Determinism & aggregation
- Records ordered by `(capability_id, validation_type, validation_status, validator, validation_id)`; findings by `(validation_id, severity, finding_id)`; artifacts by `(validation_id, artifact_path, artifact_id)`.
- **Duplicate detection**: same `(capability_id, validation_type, validation_status, validator)` (case-insensitive type/status) → first kept, rest dropped + counted.
- **Unresolved detection**: findings mapped to their capability via `validation_id`; `unresolved_count` = findings with `resolved == false`.
- **Pass/fail gate**:
```
passed = validation_count > 0
         and duplicate_validation_count == 0
         and unresolved_count == 0
```

### CLI (`axiom capability-validation-create / capability-validations / capability-validation-show / capability-validation-export`)
JSON/Markdown/CSV exports; CSV rows = header + N validations + M findings + K artifacts. 4-file evidence bundle (`capability_validation_request.json`, `capability_validation_result.json`, `capability_validation_summary.md`, `pass_fail.json`) always written under `artifacts/capability_validation_knowledge/<run_id>/`.

### Registration
Registered the 4 commands in `command_registry.py` (READ_ONLY/SAFE, POETRY_ENV, evidence outputs) and `EXPECTED_AXIOM_COMMANDS`; added module→test mapping in `test_selection_engine.py`; gitignored the artifacts dir.

## Validation
- `poetry run pytest -q` → **4319 passed, 1 skipped** (+55; baseline 4264 at #129)
- `poetry run ruff check src/ tests/` → **0 errors**
- CLI smoke verified: dedup (case-insensitive), type/status/severity normalization, unresolved-finding detection, deterministic ordering, all 3 export formats.

## What did NOT change
No existing modules' behavior; Revit 2024 baseline unaffected. Consumed layers read-only.

## Risks
Low — additive framework following the established #122–#129 template; no shared infrastructure touched.


Link to Devin session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/8ad1c9ac0d2f4252bb77647f1eabaac7
Requested by: @plamen-dev
